name: Kensington
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Kensington (Taylor & Forbes, 1979) on the 7-hexagon rhombitrihexagonal board. Place 15 counters on the 72 vertices, then slide them along the lines. Complete a triangle to relocate one enemy counter, a square to relocate two. Win by occupying all six vertices of any white hexagon or one of your own colour.
